  parameters={[{"name":"maxAgeMs","required":false,"in":"query","description":"The maximum age of the cache in milliseconds [0]-fetch dns, [-1]-from cache","schema":{"example":5000,"type":"number"}},{"name":"domain","required":true,"in":"query","schema":{"example":"example.com","type":"string"}}]}
>

  body={undefined}

  id={undefined}

  responses={{"200":{"description":"","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"domain":{"type":"string","nullable":false,"description":"The domain name of the A parsed A record.","allOf":[{"type":"object","properties":{},"title":"ARecordObject"}]},"validation":{"description":"The validation of the A validation."}},"required":["key","message"],"title":"ValidationMessage"}}},"required":["errors","warnings","info"],"title":"DnsValidationResult"}]},"queryStatus":{"example":"SUCCESS","type":"string","description":"The the A record lookup.","example":1704067200000}},"required":["domain","raw","object","validation","queryStatus","timestamp"],"title":"ARecord"}}}},"400":{"description":"Bad Request"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"},"422":{"description":"Unprocessable Entity"}}}
>
